mapper.sql: A.RWARD_ID AS rwardId, A.RWARDWNR_ID AS rwardManId, A.RWARD_CODE AS rwardCd, A.RWARD_DE AS rwardDe, A.RWARD_NM AS rwardNm, A.PBLEN_CN AS pblenCn, A.SANCTNER_ID AS sanctnerId, A.CONFM_AT AS confmAt, A.SANCTN_DT AS sanctnDt, A.RETURN_RESN AS returnResn, A.ATCH_FILE_ID AS atchFileId, A.INFRML_SANCTN_ID AS infrmlSanctnId, A.RWARD_CODE AS rwardCdNm, (SELECT C.USER_NM FROM VW_USER_MASTER C WHERE C.ESNTL_ID = A.RWARDWNR_ID) AS rwardManNm, (SELECT S.USER_NM FROM VW_USER_MASTER S WHERE S.ESNTL_ID = A.SANCTNER_ID) AS sanctnerNm, A.FRST_REGISTER_ID AS frstRegisterId, TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS frstRegisterPnttm

sql.if: AND (SELECT C.USER_NM FROM VW_USER_MASTER C WHERE C.ESNTL_ID = A.RWARDWNR_ID) LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchNm}),'%')

mapper.select:
SELECT FROM TB_RWARD_MANAGE A WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_RWARD_MANAGE A WHERE 1=1
SELECT FROM TB_RWARD_MANAGE A WHERE A.RWARD_ID = #{rwardId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_RWARD_MANAGE (RWARD_ID, RWARDWNR_ID, RWARD_CODE, RWARD_DE, RWARD_NM, PBLEN_CN, SANCTNER_ID, CONFM_AT, ATCH_FILE_ID, INFRML_SANCTN_ID, FRST_REGISTER_ID, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM) VALUES (#{rwardId}, #{rwardManId}, #{rwardCd}, #{rwardDe}, #{rwardNm}, #{pblenCn}, #{sanctnerId}, #{confmAt}, #{atchFileId}, #{infrmlSanctnId}, #{frstRegisterId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_RWARD_MANAGE SET CONFM_AT = #{confmAt}, SANCTN_DT = #{sanctnDt}, RETURN_RESN = #{returnResn}, SANCTNER_ID = #{sanctnerId} WHERE RWARD_ID = #{rwardId}
